title: Rocks Comes to Elbaf
description: On pages 14–15, this part follows Unknown person #13, Rocks D. Xebec, King Harald, Unknown person #14 as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if they did come back to life...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'd have no reason to listen to you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why we need Harald!! He's The Current King of Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: PIRATE BARBELL (CATfish Fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't we just use our strength to force them to obey?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: PIRATE KAIDO (future King of the beasts)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can do the same thing to that Harald Guy, too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Never say that again you brat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Calm down, rocks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Why you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Kaido, you too! Stop it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We just got this island! Do you two wanna turn it into a ruin already?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A group like this is bound to implode sooner or later, but this isn't the time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: right, let's hold off on that till we cash in a little more...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Get it, you horn- headed rookie?!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: HARald's My Good Pal!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll crush you if you say that crap again, Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Listen up, you lot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Elbaf is the key to Bringin' down the Holy Land!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If any of ya don't buy that, then get lost!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's your choice if ya wanna stand with me on the day of destiny!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But if you've got the guts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Follow me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'll take ya to the world's summit!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
